programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Parasites

programme.desc: The deaths of a child and a truck driver in the same hospital on the same day are investigated to see if there is a link between them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Knot for Everyone
programme.desc: In the mid-1980s, bodies of nude woman were found in remote hills of California. The police got a break when a known prostitute escaped an attacker and was able to identify him and his automobile. The suspect was 50-year-old Roger Kibbe.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Temple of Doom
programme.desc: Josh travels to the remote and landmine-riddled jungles of Cambodia to investigate the lost city of the Khmer Empire and search for a mystical relic that over 1,000 years ago gave its God King the power to incinerate his enemies.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Mysteries of Jesus
programme.desc: Josh journeys to the Holy Land to investigate a mystery of biblical proportions: where Jesus Christ was born. The investigation leads to potentially explosive revelations that may change our understanding of Jesus' origin story.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Hunt for Our Ancient Ancestors
programme.desc: Josh Gates travels the globe attempting to solve the most fundamental mystery of all: humanity's origins. How did we survive to the modern day? And what does that mean for our future?

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Unearthed: Revealing Our Ancient Ancestors
programme.desc: Unearthed with extra facts and bonus footage: Josh heads to Africa where he gets an rare look at a distant relative while tracing back the origins of humanity.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Treasure of the Warrior Queen
programme.desc: Searching across England, Josh Gates unearths a cache of ancient treasure as he chases the legend of Queen Boudica. Then, the Expedition X team investigates mysterious deaths and reported hauntings in the longest cave system in the world.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Lost Gold of Jean Lafitte
programme.desc: Josh ventures to the American south to uncover the mystery of real-life buccaneer Jean Laffite and the location of his hidden treasure.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Treasure of the Warrior Queen
programme.desc: Searching across England, Josh Gates unearths a cache of ancient treasure as he chases the legend of Queen Boudica. Then, the Expedition X team investigates mysterious deaths and reported hauntings in the longest cave system in the world.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for the Ruby Slippers
programme.desc: Josh investigates the theft of the ruby slippers worn by Judy Garland in the 1939 classic movie, The Wizard of Oz.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Hunt for Our Ancient Ancestors
programme.desc: Josh Gates travels the globe attempting to solve the most fundamental mystery of all: humanity's origins. How did we survive to the modern day? And what does that mean for our future?

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: After the Hunt: Unknown Ancestors
programme.desc: Josh Gates and the Expedition X team gather to discuss their Cambodian adventure, and Josh goes in depth on his African trip to investigate the origins of humanity.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Into the Canyons
programme.desc: Joe and Matt face down the high desert canyons of Matt's home of 20 years: southern Utah. Without knives or any modern supplies, they attempt to survive and seek rescue in this harsh terrain that's more favorable to rattlesnakes and mountain lions.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Grin and Bear It
programme.desc: Joe and Matt trek through the Alleghany Mountains of Pennsylvania, where Joe grew-up and first learned survival skills. Traveling in freezing rain, blocked by steep ravines, and deep in bear country, they're racing against Mother Nature to get out alive.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Swamplandia
programme.desc: Stranded in a black water swamp in southern Georgia, Joe and Matt are deep in alligator territory where peat bogs, mysterious floating islands, and poisonous snakes stand in the way of getting out and finding rescue.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Out of the Ashes, Part I
programme.desc: On the slopes of a tropical volcano, Matt and Joe face roadblocks in their quest to navigate towards the coast including thick rainforest, steep-walled gorges and towering waterfalls that stop them dead in their tracks.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Winter Vortex: Part One
programme.desc: In the snowiest part of Wyoming, Matt and Joe demonstrate how to repurpose a broken down snowmobile, make shelter from snow, and survive sub-freezing temperatures in whiteout conditions that cause them to miss a chance at rescue.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Winter Vortex: Part Two
programme.desc: Stranded in Wyoming's snowy mountains, Matt and Joe are threatened by hypothermia and predatory mountain lions. In frigid conditions, the pair takes their biggest risk yet by splitting up.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Downed and Out, Part I
programme.desc: Matt and Joe start at the site of a plane crash off the shore of an uninhabited tropical island. With few resources and no sea traffic to bring rescue, they are forced to confront long-term survival and each other on the barren island.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Downed and Out, Part II
programme.desc: Marooned on a barren island under the tropical sun, Matt and Joe risk a long swim through shark-infested waters and fight for life-sustaining basics at every turn.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Namibian Nightmare
programme.desc: Stranded in the vast scrubland of Namibia, Joe and Matt are in a race to get out alive from one of the driest countries on earth. They run into trouble with a troop of baboons, proving that Mother Nature isn't the only force in the wilderness.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Ozark Mountain Misery
programme.desc: The Raney family goes to the Ozarks, where Marty spent his childhood homesteading, and discovers a malnourished couple and a mouldy cabin that's making them sick. Massive electric storms hit, but the homestead must be built before Mother Nature wins.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Brandi and Kandi's Story
programme.desc: Twins Kandi and Brandi have a combined weight totaling over 1100lbs. These inseparable twins fear losing each other to obesity, so they make a change together.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Seana's Story
programme.desc: Seana is 23 and nearly 700 lbs, living at her mom's house. She is depressed and anxious and her weight-gain threatens to take her last breath. Dr. Now can give her the tools she needs to live, but until she chooses life, no one can save Seana but Seana.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Ashley B's Story
programme.desc: At 600lbs, Ashley had to move home so her mom could help her care for not just herself but her newborn daughter too. Now Ashley must overcome a lifetime's worth of unfortunate circumstances and get Dr. Now's help in Houston to find a way to go on living.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The World's Largest Lump
programme.desc: Ronen's mysterious lump above his knee is one of the largest Dr. Lee has ever seen. Amber suffers from a debilitating skin disease that no one understands. Sandy has a neck lump she calls Tommy. Kristy's eyelid cyst is ruining her life.

programme.title: Save My Skin: Abscessive Compulsive
programme.desc: Elise is tormented by leaking abscesses, Onique can feel the people staring at the lump on her ear, Dr. Emma performs the newly named 'Victor Technique' on a man plagued by bumps, and Aria's beard is the only thing standing in the way of her femininity.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Should Have Stayed a Fan
programme.desc: When newly-elected Sheriff Jonathan W. Horton takes office and finds his jail in dire need of reform, he enlists the help of seven innocent civilians to go undercover as inmates to uncover intel on the issues that plague the facility.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Full Frontal
programme.desc: With five participants already embedded in the jail, one of them drops out as others give the distress signal, leaving the Sheriff and his team wondering if completing the 60 Days In program is even possible at this facility.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Fresh Meat
programme.desc: As the last two participants enter the Etowah County Detention Center, many of the others struggle to remain in the program.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Program In Peril
programme.desc: With multiple participants already tapped out and another breaking all the rules, the program at the Etowah County Detention Center is at risk of failure, forcing Sheriff Horton and Chief Peek to take drastic measures.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Mother's Day Mayhem

programme.title: 60 Days In: Stabbed
programme.desc: As Alex reaches a turning point, Ashley and Jennifer turn on Shanese, while a competition develops between Dennis and another participant.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Shanks and Signals
programme.desc: The remaining participants are left reeling after an inmate is shanked at the Etowah County Detention Center, and one more drops out of the program.

programme.title: 60 Days In: They Know
programme.desc: With only four participants left, the remaining men vie for status in the pod, but Ashley fears the female inmates know she's a police officer, forcing Sheriff Horton and Chief Peek to make a difficult decision.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bigger and Better: Danger at Dawn

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bigger and Better: Poachers and Liars

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bigger and Better: Submerged
programme.desc: Texas Game Wardens are all hands on deck after a massive flash flood. Game Wardens rush to a gas station that could explode. A patrol through the Rio Grande leads to an unexpected encounter. Game Wardens investigate an illegally killed hawk.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Uncuffed: Smuggle Showdown
programme.desc: Warden Iles sends abandoned armadillo pups to rehab, while Warden Reneau is on the hunt to find a couple suspected of illegally killing deer. Meanwhile, Wardens Gould and Hickerson are on hot pursuit to catch drug smugglers.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Uncuffed: Beach Bandit
programme.desc: On Port Aransas, Wardens handle a pair of huskies left abandoned in the blazing heat and a minor caught drinking illegally. Warden Cummings rescues a squirrel from captivity, while a Mexican shrimp boat is halted for an illegal catch.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Uncuffed: Smuggle Showdown
programme.desc: Warden Iles sends abandoned armadillo pups to rehab, while Warden Reneau is on the hunt to find a couple suspected of illegally killing deer. Meanwhile, Wardens Gould and Hickerson are on hot pursuit to catch drug smugglers.

programme.desc: On Port Aransas, Wardens handle a pair of huskies left abandoned in the blazing heat and a minor caught drinking illegally. Warden Cummings rescues a squirrel from captivity, while a Mexican shrimp boat is halted for an illegal catch.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bullets and Lies

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Drug Run River
programme.desc: Game wardens Gould and Hickerson chase drug smugglers that crossed the Rio Grande River. Game warden Boone checks out an injured bird. Game warden Damron relocates a feisty marsupial and her babies. Amundson and Poole meet a fan.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Graham's Revenge

programme.title: Too Cute!: Jungle Kitties and Baby Skunks

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Ferocious Foster
programme.desc: Jackson meets an outdoor cat named Henry, who having been forced to live inside, has protested by soaking the place in pee. A desperate foster guardian resorts to Jackson as her only hope to save a cat from being euthanized.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Whatever It Takes

programme.desc: Chris Brown's decision to nap finds him in the crosshairs with Captain Lee. Kate puts her stews through 101 training in order to get them ready for their next charter. The new guests prove to be a handful.

programme.title: Below Deck: Kate Goes to Church
programme.desc: During their night off Jesus and Kate get to know each other while Chris Brown makes a pass at Brianna. Nico deals with the stress of the boat on the 3-month anniversary of the passing of his brother. Matt makes a move on Brianna.

programme.title: Below Deck: Cool Beans
programme.desc: Captain Lee makes a decision regarding the crew's re-configuration which rocks the team to its core. Matt's date with Brianna has an unexpected outcome when they mistakenly arrive at a nude beach. Jen grows weary with the unfair treatment.

programme.title: Below Deck: 100 Feet From Catastrophe
programme.desc: Nico is pushed to his breaking point under the leadership of boson EJ. Matt continues to unravel after his date with Brianna which causes problems for Kate. Captain Lee makes a staffing decision. Jen feels under-appreciated in her department.

programme.title: Below Deck: Blindsided
programme.desc: Leigh Anne Tuohy, the inspiration for Sandra Bullock's character in the Blindside, and her friends prove to be a challenge for Matt's culinary skills. Nico settles into life as the number two on deck, but questions if he has longevity.

programme.title: Below Deck: Under Cover Boss
programme.desc: Nico and Brianna grow closer despite Nico's girlfriend back in Chicago. Unexpected news sends Matt into an alcohol fueled day off. Baker takes the offensive in her friendship with EJ. Kate challenges Jen and Brianna to a stewardess speed test.

programme.title: Below Deck: Hot Mess Express
programme.desc: Captain Lee, Kate, Nico and Matt have their hands full when eight big personalities from Texas come on board. Matt attempts to step up his cooking game. Bruno decides to help the interior, only to discover how unorganized they are.

programme.title: Below Deck: King Come-On-I-Wanna-Lay-Ya
programme.desc: An accident puts Nico in jeopardy of finishing out the rest of the charter season. Kate is forced to leave her stews behind as she attempts to entertain the guests who are none too pleased to be land locked. Without Kate on board, old rivalries resume.

programme.title: Below Deck: Only Doing It for the Money
programme.desc: Captain Lee has a special guest come aboard and the crew gets to see a different side to their leader. A familiar face from the past surprises the crew and immediately has eyes for Jen. An all-female charter proves to be a handful.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: International Championship
programme.desc: Four of the top bladesmiths from around the globe compete in the first ever Forged In Fire International Championship.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Falcata
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths must create a blade out of high-carbon steel, while also forging the hammer they use to make it. The final two have five days to create a weapon known for its deadly prowess against armoured soldiers: the Falcata.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Astronaut Knife
programme.desc: On the 50th anniversary of the first steps on the moon, four blade smiths compete to recreate a space-age M-1 NASA survival knife out of ball bearings. In the third round the finalists construct a spiked mace.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Charlemagne's Sword
programme.desc: Four smiths crack open crucibles to reveal surprise metals they'll use to forge signature blades. The two surviving smiths move on to their home forges to recreate the legendary sword of King Charlemagne: the Joyeuse.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Cutting Deeper: Curved Blades
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths take high carbon steel and wrought iron and must forge these conflicting materials into a weapon. Later, two return home to craft a weapon from history: the Sengese. Plus, the bladesmiths create a signature slasher blade.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Darb Sri Gun Chai Battle Sword / Zulu War Axe
programme.desc: In a twist of fate, four smiths must forge a Damascus blade. After two rounds the last two smiths standing must return home and recreate the Darb Sri Gun Chai, a double handed Thai battle sword. Then, contestants try to recreate the Zulu War Axe.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Cutting Deeper: Curved Blades
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths take high carbon steel and wrought iron and must forge these conflicting materials into a weapon. Later, two return home to craft a weapon from history: the Sengese. Plus, the bladesmiths create a signature slasher blade.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Darb Sri Gun Chai Battle Sword
programme.desc: Four smiths are tasked with forging a twist and stack damascus blade. After two rounds, the remaining two smiths must recreate an enormous, double-handed Thai battle sword known as the Darb Sri Gun Chai.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Whale of a Time
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars are presented with an engraved whale's tooth believed to be authentic 1800's scrimshaw.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Bow Legged
programme.desc: The guys are presented with a unique item, a pirate's peg leg. Also, Rick has the opportunity to buy an archery bow.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Fork It Over
programme.desc: The crew checks out a fork from the wreckage of the Hindenburg.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Love Me Spender
programme.desc: An Elvis Presley contract that was signed before The King was famous gyrates into the shop. Chum and Corey look down the barrel of a rare Winchester rifle made for the popular 1800s sport of target shooting.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Gnarly Harley
programme.desc: The guys check out a customized 1951 Harley Davidson, and Corey considers adding it to his own collection. Then, a crank organ from the early 1900s is brought in. Later, the guys try to convince Rick to get a manicure.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Bald and the Beautiful
programme.desc: The guys eye a coat that was custom-made for Elvis Presley. Then, Chumlee checks out a Mercedes-Benz golf cart.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Motorcycle Mayhem
programme.desc: Rev your engines with the Pawn Stars when a 1957 Harley-Davidson Sportster roars into the shop. Then, things get political when Rick checks out a painting of Communist leader Ho Chi Minh. Later, Chum starts helping himself to things around the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Secret Agent Man
programme.desc: A 2004 World Series player's ring is brought to shop, the year the Red Sox broke the curse of the Bambino. Then, Chumlee spies a toy James Bond Aston Martin from the 1960s, and the guys try to convince Rick to take a vacation.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Penny for your Pawn
programme.desc: A 1930s Gottlieb grip tester and a limited edition piece of art by actor Anthony Quinn arrive at the shop. Also, Chum offers to help promote the shop by trying to make images of Old Man go viral.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn Another Day
programme.desc: Madonna's 1988 day planner; a 1910 phrenology head; an 1800s locket with preacher Henry Ward Beecher; a 1980s egg chair used for hearing tests.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pops Pawn
programme.desc: An astrological armillary sphere; a British Smarties candy dispenser; a signed Louis Armstrong photo and handkerchief; a vintage Ghirardelli billboard.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Samurais and Centerfolds
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars learn the way of the samurai when Rick and Chumlee come to grips with a valuable Japanese katana from the 1800s.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Happiest Place to Pawn
programme.desc: An anti-war speech signed by Dr. Martin Luther King stuns Rick and Corey. Rick and Chum check out a remote-controlled miniature version of a Disney Jungle Cruise ride's boat. A German 'Blue Max' medal from WWI has Rick itchy to justify the seller's price.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: A Killer Cap
programme.desc: A top hat and pistol said to have once belonged to a Jack the Ripper suspect have Rick greatly intrigued. Corey is set on obtaining a 1920s time clock. Rick and Chum must decide on the purchase of a slew of celebrity signatures and the rights to a game.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: La La Land
programme.desc: Rick travels to Los Angeles to see what goods he can find for the shop. He discovers the largest 'Willy Wonka and the Chocolate Factory' prop collection in existence. Chum finds a helicopter owned by Vegas magician Dirk Arthur.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Chuminator
programme.desc: Rick and Chumlee head to L.A. to 'terminate' a deal on set pieces from the iconic movie 'The Terminator'. Then, Corey checks out some pieces of Alice in Chains memorabilia. Plus, Rick and Chumlee test some old steel printing plates.

programme.desc: Special access inside one of the world's biggest cruise ships reveals the secrets of a high-class, hi-tech floating city that can accommodate thousands of guests and weather the roughest seas.

programme.title: Richard Hammond's Big: World's Tallest Building
programme.desc: Richard Hammond goes behind-the-scenes at the Burj Khalifa, the tallest building on the planet. We reveal how cutting-edge engineering keeps this record-breaking, 2,722-foot-tall skyscraper standing straight in precarious desert sands.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Chicago's Tower of Terror
programme.desc: When the innovative design of an iconic Chicago skyscraper leads to tragedy, experts must apply cutting-edge tech and the latest engineering methods to fix an urgent, life-or-death problem.

programme.desc: Special access inside one of the world's biggest cruise ships reveals the secrets of a high-class, hi-tech floating city that can accommodate thousands of guests and weather the roughest seas.

programme.desc: Richard Hammond goes behind-the-scenes at the Burj Khalifa, the tallest building on the planet. We reveal how cutting-edge engineering keeps this record-breaking, 2,722-foot-tall skyscraper standing straight in precarious desert sands.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Chicago's Tower of Terror
programme.desc: When the innovative design of an iconic Chicago skyscraper leads to tragedy, experts must apply cutting-edge tech and the latest engineering methods to fix an urgent, life-or-death problem.

programme.desc: The US Navy's Ford-class aircraft carrier is the world's largest warship, and using the latest naval and aeronautic technology, engineers and military personnel race to build and test this cutting-edge vessel.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Treasure of Solomon
programme.desc: The High Priests of the Temple in Jerusalem could have hidden their most sacred items before the city was sacked by the Romans and the Dead Sea Scrolls could actually be a treasure map to these hidden wonders. See what else lies under this ancient city.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Oracles of the Dead
programme.desc: The Oracles were thought to be young women of the underworld who were consulted by ancient Greek society, and their visions helped shape the course of history. Find the truth behind their extraordinary trances and apparent psychic powers.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret History of Jesus
programme.desc: Experts use new discoveries to reveal the true story of Jesus Christ, and using cutting-edge tech, this critical evidence is challenging everything we know about the man who changed history.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Lost Treasures of Petra
programme.desc: It is one of the great wonders of the ancient world, but there is little information on who built the magnificent city of Petra in Jordan and why. See what treasure remains buried there and the dark secrets that remain in this mysterious place.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret History of James Bond
programme.desc: James Bond is one of the famous characters in history, and new discoveries reveal there might be a secret truth behind this world-famous figure. Experts team up with a former spy to separate fact from fiction and reveal the secrets of modern espionage.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Conspiracy on Death Island
programme.desc: A strange, abandoned mansion on a remote island is central to countless conspiracy theories, and new discoveries reveal if this eerie site was a secret Nazi base intended for a sinister mission.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Devil's Lair
programme.desc: When a top-secret Nazi base is discovered in France decades after the war ends, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal the secrets of this deadly compound; what they find could change everything we know about D-Day and the last stand of the Nazi regime.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Invisible City
programme.desc: As the Soviet Army pushes the Nazis out of Poland, they discover a massive city of over a thousand buildings that was unknown to the Allies, and using the latest science, experts reveal how Hitler was able to keep this sinister place hidden for so long.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Mystery of the Nazi Nukes
programme.desc: When a secret bunker and a vast network of tunnels are discovered after World War II, experts use cutting-edge tech to uncover if the high levels of radiation in the area could be connected to a classified Nazi nuclear program.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Forbidden Island
programme.desc: New discoveries on a strange fortified island reveal the terrifying truth behind Hitler's secret plan to win World War II at all costs, and using the latest science and tech, experts investigate what really happened here.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Doomsday Castle
programme.desc: An abandoned eerie structure in France could have doomed the Allies in World War II, and new discoveries at this mysterious site reveal the truth behind top-secret Nazi plans to unleash apocalyptic destruction.

programme.title: Shipwreck Secrets: Nazis in the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: New evidence in the Bermuda Triangle could reveal the Nazis got closer to America than ever believed, and using the latest cutting-edge technology, experts investigate the truth behind the shipwreck that shouldn't exist.

programme.title: Marcia Clark Investigates The First 48: Chandra Levy
programme.desc: Marcia Clark examines the mysterious death of Chandra Levy, the Washington DC intern who had an alleged affair with United States Congressman, Gary Condit. With no one held accountable for Chandra's brutal murder, Marcia investigates what really happened.

programme.title: The First 48: The Detective Speaks: Deadly Morning
programme.desc: In Cleveland, a young mother walking alone to work is viscously murdered and dumped in an abandoned house.

programme.title: The First 48: Missing Persons: The Good Student/ Left in Danger/ Lady on a Bridge
programme.desc: Detectives search for a missing student, hunt down an alleged gang member, and save a woman threatening suicide on a bridge.

programme.title: The First 48: The Detective Speaks: Murder in Treme
programme.desc: In New Orleans, when a woman is slashed to death, the investigation into her murder leads Dets. Chuck Ward and Rob Barrere to a house of horrors, and they discover the killer may be someone they least expected.

programme.title: The First 48: Missing Persons: A History of Violence
programme.desc: When a young woman and her babies vanish, detectives learn that a second woman and her baby are missing too, and one man may be responsible for both disappearances.

programme.title: Marcia Clark Investigates The First 48: Billionaire Boys Club
programme.desc: Marcia dives into the world of greed, money and power to unweave the tangled web of ambition and lies that strangled The Billionaire Boys Club.

programme.title: American Justice: The Doctor's Wife
programme.desc: An affair between a doctor and his nurse leads to the deaths of himself and his wife.

programme.title: American Justice: Body of Evidence: The Tom Capano Trial
programme.desc: Prosecutor Thomas Capano was sentenced to death for murdering his ex-lover.

programme.title: Nightwatch: When Work Becomes Family
programme.desc: It's New Year's in New Orleans and gun violence is rampant as police and EMS deal with armed robberies and shootings. Plus, EMT Gavin returns to the job, and everyone celebrates a new addition to the family.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Pride
programme.desc: In a night filled with multiple shootings, Holly and Nick have to search for a gunshot victim that has gone missing. Meanwhile, Titus and Dan tend to a man stabbed multiple times. Keeley is heartbroken about the shooting tragedy in Orlando.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: Fifty Tons
programme.desc: A local casino's connection to a prostitution ring may give detectives the chance to hurt the cartels.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: Third Time's a Charm
programme.desc: Detectives are determined to take down Quack, one of Laredo's most notorious heroin dealers.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: A River Runs Through It
programme.desc: A woman drives with 60 pounds of dope in her car trunk while her daughter sleeps in the backseat.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: A Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: With a large shipment of heroin about to arrive in Laredo, the LPD team conducts a citywide crackdown of suspected heroin dealers to learn where and when the drugs will arrive.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: Show Me the Money
programme.desc: Roly goes undercover to nab a top cocaine and heroin dealer, whose most recent crime involved shooting an officer.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: The Ledger
programme.desc: LPD Narcotics busts a stash house holding cocaine and guns, plus a ledger filled with information that could help end a heavy cocaine operation.

programme.title: Crime 360: Fatal Feud
programme.desc: Two men who live next to each other in a housing project get into a deadly argument. Crewell and Williams take two men's girlfriends back to headquarters to find out what happened.

programme.title: American Monster: Sing for the Camera
programme.desc: In the summer of 2014, a peaceful community in Hartford, WI is shaken to its core when a local teenager is found dead, the victim of a brutal murder, and the second victim in two days. The community must recognize that a killer lives among them.

programme.title: American Monster: Anything for You
programme.desc: The Snyders are thrilled when their 34-year-old son Mike finally starts a family with his sweetheart - as seen in these home videos. But after being diagnosed with a terrible illness, Mike vanishes. Only years later does his horrific fate comes to light.

programme.title: American Monster: The Last Valentine
programme.desc: In Oklahoma, Dr. John Hamilton and his wife Susan are the envy of all: successful, respected and very much in love - until a vicious Valentine's Day murder destroys their lives.

programme.title: American Monster: Too Good to be True
programme.desc: When attractive teacher Amanda Schmitt marries respected John Grazioli, home video captures their beautiful wedding. But just 6 months later, police respond to a 911 call and make a shocking discovery that unmasks the double life of a cold-hearted killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Man in the Black Hat
programme.desc: On April 14, 2009, 25-year old student Julissa Brisman is found shot and bound in an upmarket hotel room in Boston. With no witnesses to the crime, investigators turn to surveillance cameras in the surrounding area and quickly unravel a serial attacker.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Is That Blood?
programme.desc: When devoted mother Danielle Pruett goes missing in Tazewell, Virginia, police launch an investigation to find her. When her lifeless body is discovered in an open field, what starts as a web of lies and deceit becomes a race to track her killer.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: In Plain Sight
programme.desc: When a sexual predator is discovered hiding in plain sight, John helps police in the pursuit of dangerous James Meece; after a brutal home invasion, Cal goes into the field to help police track down the dangerous James Watts.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: American Nightmare
programme.desc: John follows the trail of fugitive Leroy Headley whose 911 call sends police down a dark and twisting path that unravels a history of violence. Cal uncovers hidden truths behind the case of Jeffrey Forrest, a dangerous sexual predator on the run.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Is That Blood?
programme.desc: When devoted mother Danielle Pruett goes missing in Tazewell, Virginia, police launch an investigation to find her. When her lifeless body is discovered in an open field, what starts as a web of lies and deceit becomes a race to track her killer.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: In Plain Sight
programme.desc: When a sexual predator is discovered hiding in plain sight, John helps police in the pursuit of dangerous James Meece; after a brutal home invasion, Cal goes into the field to help police track down the dangerous James Watts.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: American Nightmare
programme.desc: John follows the trail of fugitive Leroy Headley whose 911 call sends police down a dark and twisting path that unravels a history of violence. Cal uncovers hidden truths behind the case of Jeffrey Forrest, a dangerous sexual predator on the run.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Man in the Black Hat
programme.desc: On April 14, 2009, 25-year old student Julissa Brisman is found shot and bound in an upmarket hotel room in Boston. With no witnesses to the crime, investigators turn to surveillance cameras in the surrounding area and quickly unravel a serial attacker.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: This is Not a Drill
programme.desc: It was an ordinary day at Chardon High School in Ohio, full of the fights, laughs and boisterous behaviour that fill the corridors of any high school. But all that changes when one young man shows up with violence on his mind.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: Dragged to Hell
programme.desc: Amanda Storms watches her high school sweetheart transform from great stepdad to abusive husband. When he moves out, she's grateful for the help of her friend Andrew Shepherd - until a terrible night of violence changes everything.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: Hearts on Fire
programme.desc: Billy Frietag is a free-spirited young man who spends the warmer months working the family fruit and vegetable farm, and travels when it's cold. Tragically, it's his openness and generosity that lead to strange set of events which culminate in his death.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: Any Other Day
programme.desc: When Shirlee Sherman and Thomas Hunter are found stabbed to death in an upscale home in Omaha, Nebraska, suspects and clues are in short supply. It will take Detectives five years to zero on a perpetrator, but not before he kills again.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: I Speak For Amy
programme.desc: College athlete Kayleigh Ballantyne is returning home one night when she is violently attacked. As she battles for her life, she is unaware that elsewhere in the city an investigation is already underway following the discovery of a young woman's body.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Once Bitten
programme.desc: Sherri Rasmussen and John Ruetten are enjoying newlywed life until one morning in 1986 when Sherri calls into work sick. That night John returns home, only to find her murdered. Years later, detectives discover her killer was too close for comfort.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Hollywood Horror Story
programme.desc: In 2012, hikers in Los Angeles' Hollywood Hills discover the severed head of Hervey Medellin, a retired flight clerk. The cast of suspects includes former lovers, drug cartels and a murderous porn star, in a tale of lust, greed and butchery.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: My Father, The Serial Killer
programme.desc: Horror strikes a small Wisconsin town in 1980 after a young couple disappears and is later discovered in a field. Dubbed the Sweetheart Murders, it's almost 40 years before a woman comes forward saying her family holds the key to unlocking the case.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Mister Wrong
programme.desc: Ty Underwood leaves her insular hometown to start fresh, vowing to be up-front with potential suitors about being transgender. Her shocking murder exposes chats with anonymous men on a phone app. The app may reveal a killer, but not identities.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Evil Among Us
programme.desc: In early August 2015, Jeffrey Kebler is found dead in his Clinton County, MI home. In order to track down his killer, detectives must follow a digital trail left by the victim. What they end up uncovering is way more than they bargained for.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Texts and Threats
programme.desc: After losing his dream girl to an older guy, Seath Jackson launches into a bitter social media war with his ex and her new man. Soon after, Seath disappears. Detectives work to find out if this is a runaway case or something more serious.

programme.title: Grave Mysteries: Ultimate Betrayal
programme.desc: Parents return home from a trip to find blood everywhere, signs of struggle and their teenage daughter missing. Police combing the desert for her stumble on her charred remains digital clues soon lead them to a shocking secret and a deadly betrayal.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Patriots and Presidents
programme.desc: Learn the truth behind some of America's most powerful men and the birth of the country they governed.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Tales of Sea and Sky
programme.desc: We expose the truth behind the history on the high seas and we take wing to separate myth from truth about the nation's pioneering aviators.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Civil War
programme.desc: From a secret society that gathers in the dead of night and plots the assassination of Abraham Lincoln, to U.S. spymaster Alan Pinkerton who stops Confederate agents, the outcome of the Civil War is often decided by spies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Code Wars
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. Now, with encryption available for technological devices, U.S. code warriors have a new obstacle to manuever in exposing their enemies.

programme.title: Weaponology: Sniper Rifles
programme.desc: Centuries of technological innovation have resulted in the creation of rifles that can kill a man from 2,000 yards. The history of bullets, guns, sights, mechanisms, camouflage and tactics is revealed.

programme.title: Weaponology: Rapid Fire
programme.desc: One man, one weapon, lots of bullets. From the cumbersome but deadly Gatling gun to the lightweight, hand-held assassins of the modern battlefield, trace the men and the moments that developed the most deadly family of infantry weapons.

programme.title: Weaponology: Spetsnaz
programme.desc: Spetsnaz are Russia's elite fighting force. From counter terrorist strike squads to special operations experts spearheading the Red Army, these ultimate warriors strike hard and fast.

programme.title: Weaponology: French Foreign Legion
programme.desc: Gathered from the four corners of the globe, Legionnaires leave their past behind to fight for the glory of France.

programme.title: Weaponology: Rapid Fire
programme.desc: One man, one weapon, lots of bullets. From the cumbersome but deadly Gatling gun to the lightweight, hand-held assassins of the modern battlefield, trace the men and the moments that developed the most deadly family of infantry weapons.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Code Wars
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. Now, with encryption available for technological devices, U.S. code warriors have a new obstacle to manuever in exposing their enemies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Civil War
programme.desc: From a secret society that gathers in the dead of night and plots the assassination of Abraham Lincoln, to U.S. spymaster Alan Pinkerton who stops Confederate agents, the outcome of the Civil War is often decided by spies.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Nazi Jewel Heist
programme.desc: When the U.S. military takes over the German Kronberg Castle in 1945, a scandalous affair between a U.S. Army Captain and Air Force Officer ensues, resulting in one of the most elaborate treasure heists of all time.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Demon Doctor
programme.desc: Known for his dubious medical practices and shady financial deals, the Nazi occupation liberated Dr. Marcel Petio's murderous instincts, enabling him to embark on a shocking killing spree.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Dutch Schultz
programme.desc: In the lawless days of Prohibition America, one gangster stands out as the black sheep Dutch Schultz. When Dutch threatens to kill a state prosecutor, the mob can't risk the fallout, so they send Dutch a special message: a body full of lead.

programme.title: The Mafia Kingpin
programme.desc: Arnold Rothstein schooled the founders of the American Mafia in the ways of organized crime during the 1920s and the the model for running crime business.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Spec Ops Pistols
programme.desc: For today's elite warriors, their last line of defence is the spec ops pistols. Wil tests the Navy Seal Sig Sauer P226, then fires the greatest forerunners like James Bond's Walther PPK, the Soviet Tokarev and the massive Desert Eagle.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Gatling and the A-10
programme.desc: The aerial Gatling gun has the highest rate of fire of any military machine gun in the world. Host Wil Willis flies in an F16 to see the six thousand round a minute Vulcan rip apart targets and fires the minigun from a helicopter at exploding cars.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: We reveal the remarkable story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Killing Mussolini
programme.desc: A look at the once all-powerful Mussolini, friend of the Fuhrer, who ended his days hanging upside down like a grotesque animal carcass in Milan's Piazzale Loreto.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Top Secret World War II
programme.desc: We've all heard about the ultra covert units used in WWII, the unbreakable codes, top secret underground nerve centers, and super-human navy seals, but here is what history forgot about WWII's most classified operations.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Breaking the Rules
programme.desc: We all know the significance of the Civil War, the CIA, the Civil Rights movement, and the advent of flight. There are many more rules that were broken to forge the American spirit that we don't know about. Joe Moniaci reveals what history forgot.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Tale of Two Houses
programme.desc: Nicole is back in action and juggling two Detroit houses at the same time. While the Ferndale house is in great shape, the 14 Mile property is gutted of its original fixtures and charm. Ferndale serves as the inspiration for renovations at 14 Mile.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Close Quarters
programme.desc: Nicole tackles a 1920s house that used to be a rental and has incredibly small upstairs bedrooms. She plans to change the layout and add character, including removing a wall to make room for a new hallway and custom linen closet.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Master Bath Miracle
programme.desc: Nicole finds that turning a tiny, dated bathroom into an en suite master bath isn't easy as she struggles to fit a soaking tub, shower and custom vanity in the space to give it stately, historic appeal.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Maximizing the Master Suite
programme.desc: Nicole has almost completed the upstairs in her 14-Mile house. Now it's to time to unveil a bigger and brighter master bedroom. To get the look she wants, she has to knock down some walls, open up the ceiling and bring in a very special feature.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Matching Game
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis continues work on the den and powder room of her 1920s 14-Mile house.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: The Basement Blues
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis ventures down into the creepy basement of her 14-Mile project. She's then faced with a dilemma when an unforeseen turn of events threatens the entire project.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Cooking Up the Kitchen
programme.desc: Nicole begins construction in the kitchen of the 14 Mile house. Working with a limited space and no original details, she is forced to attempt something she has never done before: an open kitchen.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Adding Style to 14 Mile
programme.desc: As the renovation of the 14 Mile house winds down, there's one more thing that needs to be done: finish the exterior. After repairing damage from a car accident, Nicole has a chance to bring back original details the house lost decades ago.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Families Helping Families
programme.desc: Mike is going back to his roots and helping families, along with his kids, Michael and Sherry. At a home they dub The City Barn, they plan to fix the weathered roof and make the property more accessible for a 13-year-old who is battling cancer.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Divide and Conquer
programme.desc: Structural issues at their two clients' houses means Mike and Michael must split up and tackle the jobs separately. Michael takes on the roof and other problems at The City Barn, while Mike uncovers unsettling complications.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Not a Dry Eye in the House
programme.desc: The Flood House is close to completion and the showpiece gas fireplace with a custom mantel brings one of the homeowners to tears. Over at The City Barn, more structural issues arise, creating greater challenges than Mike and the team expected.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Nightmares and Dreams
programme.desc: A marathon runner hired a contractor to design her perfect kitchen, but he was unqualified and ended up compromising the home's structure. Now it's up to Mike and his kids to make things right and restore her peace of mind.

programme.title: Yard Crashers: Sky Cabin Side Yard at Blog Cabin
programme.desc: Chris and his team descend on Blog Cabin 2016 to turn an empty side yard into a recreational destination complete with a stilted guest retreat, two-tiered deck with custom lounge chairs and a sand volleyball court.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Bethany Beach
programme.desc: Jim and Tina have purchased a 1930s beach cottage in Bethany Beach, Delaware for their family. The house has a few charming touches, but a lot of aesthetic and structural issues.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Backyard Beauty
programme.desc: Being close to the water in South Bethany, Delaware means unwanted wear and tear on Jay and Christine's back deck. They enlist Marnie to update and renovate the space.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Boxed in at the Beach
programme.desc: Chris and Danielle's cottage in Bethany Beach, Delaware, is too cramped for their family of five. Marnie attempts to convert the wasted deck space and bare backyard into a spacious beach escape.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Flood-Ridden to Fabulous
programme.desc: Due to the layout of their property, Tom and Kim's spacious backyard gets overrun by flooding during thunderstorms. They enlist Marnie to make the yard flood-proof and transform the impractical space into an outdoor living area.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: The Beach Gut
programme.desc: A couple transports a 60-year-old house to a plot of land near the beach in the hopes it can be transformed into the perfect beach getaway. Marnie must renovate the home while keeping its rustic charm from the 1960s.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: From Soaked to Saved
programme.desc: A couple has invested in a 50-year-old abandoned home in Dewey Beach, Delaware. They decide to hand the reins over to Marnie in the hopes she'll turn the fixer-upper into a safe vacation destination for their two boys.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Save It or Sell It
programme.desc: A couple loves Lewes and the cheerful home they own there, but their two daughters have outgrown the space. Now, the family's torn between selling the house or renovating it. Marnie tries to expand the home without losing its historic charm.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Beauty and the Beach
programme.desc: A townhouse overlooking Bethany Beach is dated and awkward. Marnie attempts to update the home, but the discovery of water damage may affect her ability to make the most of its dazzling view.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Open-Concept Canal Home
programme.desc: Karen's 30-year-old canal-side home has an enormous backyard and attractive deck area, but its choppy 1980s layout and awkward additions aren't functional for entertaining. Marnie has big plans for it including an indoor and outdoor kitchen renovation.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Amazing A-Frame
programme.desc: A couple turns to Marnie to help them transform their shabby A-frame retreat into a beautiful family beach home.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Volcano Home
programme.desc: A couple builds a rainforest retreat within the edge of an active volcano on Hawaii's Big Island.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Tropical Paradise
programme.desc: A couple plans to build an oceanfront oasis for their family on the slopes of Maui, Hawaii. To keep the budget low, they design a Quonset hut which can be built cheaply and quickly, but unexpected setbacks test their limits at every turn.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Rocky Mountains
programme.desc: A creative mountain biking group from Carbondale, Colorado builds a unique mountain retreat that doubles as their very own bike park feature.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Ozark Paradise
programme.desc: A realtor and his three children set out to build their dream home together on a wooded ridge top in the Ozark Mountains of Oklahoma.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Philadelphia
programme.desc: We're going to Philadelphia to show you some of the best things we ever ate. There's impossibly delicious pasta at Vetri and perfect mashed potatoes at Parc.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: San Diego
programme.desc: San Diego may be the land of sun, surf and fun, but it's also home to some of the best dining spots around.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Bay Area
programme.desc: San Francisco proves that barbeque is not strictly southern, with the pork bun at Yank Sing.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Seattle
programme.desc: In Seattle, the crab cakes are so good it's an obsession, and you can find a seriously good slice of pizza at Serious Pie.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Phenomenal Philly Food Feast
programme.desc: Nick Lachey hooks up with Michael Symon in Philadelphia, one of the best beer cities in the country with a food scene to match. From Chef Jose Garces' over-the-top bourbon burger, to true German smoked sausages.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Salty and Smoky in the Windy City
programme.desc: Anthony Anderson hooks up with Michael Symon to discover some of the city's legendary food institutions for sensational smoke sausages and indulgent burgers.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Far East Meats Wild West
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, Nev., Michael Symon tackles towering burgers piled with spicy Korean pork bulgogi and juicy pork belly pastrami. In Denver, a modern-day sloppy joe is loaded with iconic brisket burnt ends. Finally, a fusion spot in Tulsa serves lamb-chili.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Bayou Barbecue and Saucy Skillets
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Las Vegas, Nev., with a skillet full of pork belly chili and a mega-pancake that's the ultimate collision of apple pie and brunch.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Whole Animals
programme.desc: Roger's learning to rig up and roast whole animals with some truly wild techniques. First he'll learn an ancient Argentine method of roasting lamb upright over coals by hanging them on cast iron crosses in the open air.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fishing For Fire
programme.desc: In a pit, under a kettle, or in between hunks of heavy metal, Roger's showing off three flame-licking good feasts that are packing high heat.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Women Fire Food
programme.desc: Roger Mooking salutes the country's most impressive and creative female pitmasters, learning a few new roasting methods along the way.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat Mania
programme.desc: It's a carnivore extravagance as Roger Mooking visits pitmasters cooking meat in massive quantities.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Quebec City
programme.desc: Andrew scopes out the creative, rustic comfort dishes of Quebec City, Canada. Influenced by French and English settlers, the city is full of old world charm, late-night diners, hearty food and plenty of maple syrup.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Baja
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern dives in to the Mediterranean and seafood-heavy cuisine of Baja California, Mexico. From simple smoked tuna to crispy fish tacos, Caesar salad to zesty seafood cocktail hangover cures, Baja's cuisine is an international sensation.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Denver
programme.desc: Andrew explores the frontier fare of Denver, Colorado. From classic game meats remade for the modern palette to the signature green chilli sauce of Den-Mex cuisine, Denver has become the region's cultural hub with an abundance of top-shelf food.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Cartagena
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern shows off the tempting flavors of Cartagena, Colombia. From fried fish and sizzling egg arepas to bedroom-boosting fruits and seafood stews, the taste of the coast infuses every bite.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Pizza, Burgers and Cookies
programme.desc: Brad Miller visits the Mile High City, Denver, where the family-run Simply Pizza Truck is cranking out crowd-pleasing Neapolitan-style pizzas in 90 seconds flat thanks to a massive wood-burning oven.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Barbecue Ribs, Cheese Melts and Cake Balls

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Alabama BBQ

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Low Country Cookouts
programme.desc: Roger's in charming South Carolina for two spectacular low country cookouts: a traditional backyard pig pickin' and a classic oyster roast.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Lone Star Load-Up

programme.desc: Webby leads the kids in a race against the Beagles to find a secret treasure while hiding a secret of her own. Della is forced to teach Launchpad how to actually fly a plane.

programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Who Let the Frogs Out?
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Domino Effect / Taking Charge
programme.desc: Anne wants to keep a caterpillar as a pet, but she'll have to keep it a secret from Hop Pop; After one of the Plantars mysteriously runs out the charge on Anne's phone, the family embarks on a mission to try and recharge it.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Northwest Mansion Mystery
programme.desc: Pacifica asks Dipper to bust a poltergeist haunting the Northwest Mansion, before he wreaks havoc on her fancy party.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Roadside Attraction
programme.desc: Grunkle Stan takes the kids with him on a road-trip to sabotage all the other tourist traps in Oregon.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Supersonic Sue
programme.desc: Big Hero 6 attempt to thwart a bank robbery and are defeated by Supersonic Sue, an old school roller-skating villain.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Seventh Wheel
programme.desc: Professor Granville becomes increasingly pushy with her suggestions for Big Hero 6 as she helps them try to figure out a mysterious series of food-related burglaries.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Just Get Over It
programme.desc: DanTDM and friends try not to rage quit while playing one of the hardest games in the world.

programme.title: Parker Plays
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: JAW$!
programme.desc: Lena unleashes a magical megalodon in Scrooge's money bin.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Other Bin of Scrooge McDuck!
programme.desc: Lena uses Webby to infiltrate the vault where Scrooge keeps all his most dangerous artifacts.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Double Dipper
programme.desc: When Stan throws a big weekend party to promote the Mystery Shack, Dipper uses an off-kilter copy machine to make clones of himself so he can impress Wendy. Meanwhile, Mabel stands up for her friends and fights for the Party Queen title in their honour.

programme.title: DuckTales: Timephoon!
programme.desc: When Louie uses Gyro's Time Tub to steal lost treasures from the past, a mysterious storm in the present sends all of space and time crashing down onto the mansion.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Della Duck?!
programme.desc: Marooned, Della struggles for survival against the foreign elements of the Moon.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Level Up/ Wild Side
programme.desc: Bill gets addicted to a farm-simulating video game. Cricket's feral wild side takes over when Bill is unable to replicate their old camping trips.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Freakerheads/ For Whom the Smell Tolls
programme.desc: Hank is obsessed with the latest fad, Freakerheads! Mavis smells like rainbows and puppy dog tails when she reaches the next level event in vampire afterlife.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Exit Sandman/ Roadkill Trip
programme.desc: Mavis and the group rebuild Diane's chicken coop, but their efforts are interrupting the Sandman's sleeping patterns. His solution is to cast a spell on them. When Mavis and Uncle Gene learn that the Roadkill Grill is closing, they plan a road trip.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Hardlight
programme.desc: Now fugitives, Big Hero 6 lay low as the SFPD searches for them. However, new villain Hardlight shows up hoping to challenge Big Hero 6 to a real-life videogame duel.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Hiro The Villain
programme.desc: Momakase blackmails Hiro into helping her steal her family's knives from Yama's safe.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Let's Take a Snakacation
programme.desc: Crank goes snake hunting in Donut County, DanTDM explores Vacation Simulator's oceans, Jack tries Enter the Gungeon and CupQuake battles in Fortnite.

programme.title: Parker Plays: Jimmy Steals the Show
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Outlaw Scrooge McDuck!
programme.desc: In the Old West, Scrooge and Goldie form a band of outlaws and stage a heist to save a small town from corrupt businessman, John D. Rockerduck.

programme.title: DuckTales: Happy Birthday, Doofus Drake!
programme.desc: Louie and Goldie crash Doofus' birthday party to con their way into some million dollar gift bags as Della trains Huey in her favourite online game.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Soos and the Real Girl
programme.desc: When Soos finds himself in need of a date for his cousin Reggie's engagement party, he looks to a dating simulator game to help him talk to girls.

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: DuckTales: Moonvasion!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Rise Above It All
Big Hero 6: The Series: Legacies
programme.desc: Chief Cruz and the police get the upper hand in their battle with both villains and Big Hero 6 when they begin using Buddy Guardians, powerful new robots produced by Krei Tech.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Shark Objects / Dream Weaver
programme.desc: When Greens try to spend an eventful day at the beach, Cricket tries to prank the beach-goers; Cricket discovers he can influence the family's dreams to disastrous real-life results.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Inspiration! Challenging Valt!
programme.desc: Blading superstar Valt Aoi visits Dante for a friendly battle before opening the Bey Carnival; once the tournament begins, the Victories will need to get the hang of the Hyper Stadium if they hope to win.

programme.title: Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: Living on the Cutting Edge!
programme.desc: Objects are being cut into pieces all over Melemele Island, and the Ultra Guardians set out to investigate!

programme.desc: Two boyhood friends, who have become pilots prior to the Second World War, become enemies when they both fall for the same woman in Hawaii. Their complicated love triangle unravels when the Japanese attack Pearl Harbor on December 7, 1941.

programme.title: Movie: Unknown
programme.desc: After awakening from a coma, a man discovers that his identity has been stolen.

programme.title: Movie: Unfriended

programme.title: Movie: The Conjuring 2

programme.title: Movie: Soldier
programme.desc: Defeated by his genetically engineered replacements, a sergeant must save a community.

programme.title: Movie: Brothers

programme.title: Movie: Welcome Home Roxy Carmichael

programme.title: Movie: Red Riding Hood

programme.title: Movie: The Mule

programme.title: Movie: American Woman

programme.title: Movie: The Impossible

programme.desc: A young girl sneaks out of her house to meet a movie star who invited her to a party. Later that night, a patrolman finds her in an alley, sexually assaulted and barely alive. Benson suspects the movie star and his manager are covering up the crime.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Intimidation Game
programme.desc: When a female employee is assaulted at a gamer convention, Detective Tutuola investigates the crime. A female game developer refuses to delay her game launch, and the cops must 'level up' to protect her.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: December Solstice
programme.desc: Celebrity author Walter Briggs is the focus of a feud between his sixth wife and his daughters from previous marriages. The fight over control for both his well-being and his estate become a criminal case when Charmaine is accused of abuse.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Transgender Bridge
programme.desc: A transgendered teen walks home through a park and is assaulted. The DA's office decides to charge one of the assailants as an adult leaving detectives to wonder if the punishment fits the crime.

programme.title: The Sinner: Part V
programme.desc: Ambrose urges the NYPD to investigate Jamie for a new crime; Jamie struggles to salvage his life.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Justice
programme.desc: After a hooded man opens fire on their patrol car, Roman is left wounded and Burgess takes off after the shooter. No gun is found at the crime scene and the victim is a 17-year-old honour student who will likely never walk again.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: What Could Have Been
programme.desc: Intelligence's investigation into the murder of Burgess's boyfriend threatens to reveal a dark side she was unaware of. The real motivation for his murder uncovers a much more unsettling truth.

programme.title: The Sinner: Part V
programme.desc: Ambrose urges the NYPD to investigate Jamie for a new crime; Jamie struggles to salvage his life.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Song of Gregory William Yates

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Night Owl
programme.desc: While working at a sobriety checkpoint, Burgess finds a duffle bag full of heroin in the truck of a respected college professor who claims to know nothing about how the drugs ended up there.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Cases That Need to Be Solved
programme.desc: When a young boy is executed, Intelligence turns to the boy's parents for information. Upon further investigation, they discover the boy's father has a criminal background and was part of a local gang.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Forty-Caliber Bread Crumb
programme.desc: While out on a bank run for his off-duty security job, Halstead and his co-workers find themselves under attack by a violent robbery crew which quickly becomes a full-scale shoot-out.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Mea Culpa
programme.desc: New forensic evidence discovered in an old case causes an unexpected shake-up for Grissom.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Skin Deep
programme.desc: The team heads to the beach to question the possible link between a surfer, an Internet video and a dead naval tech scientist. Meanwhile, as Callen and Hanna investigate the victim's intelligence connections, Deeks and Kensi go catch some waves.

programme.title: NCIS: Dead Reckoning
programme.desc: Gibbs reluctantly teams up with Trent Kort when the enigmatic CIA Agent returns to call in a favour.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: She's Got Us
programme.desc: When Lindsay and Halstead arrive at the scene of a shooting, they discover the only survivor is a young girl. Meanwhile, Antonio and Olinsky look into a pyramid scheme.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Don't Bury This Case

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Don't Read the News
programme.desc: After the body of a young woman is found with multiple gunshot wounds, Intelligence discovers this case may be connected with several other cases, and they uncover a serial killer is working in Chicago.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: You Wish
programme.desc: When a mutilated sex offender is found dead, it is unclear if he was the victim of a crime. As intelligence questions those related to the case, they find themselves up against a special police force that may be covering up illegal activities.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Sanctuary

programme.title: The King of Queens: Pole Lox
programme.desc: At Doug's encouragement, Carrie reluctantly agrees to start taking pole dancing lessons, but quickly starts to enjoy the classes and begins feeling better about herself. However, when Carrie puts on a show for him, he is shocked by how badly she dances.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Vocal Discord
programme.desc: In an effort to save money, Doug and Carrie ask their neighbour Glenn for counselling since he happens to be a marriage counsellor. Glenn agrees to help out only to have his problem-solving techniques backfire, causing their arguments to get worse.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Consummate Professional
programme.desc: Carrie discovers that Doug lied to her about getting a job at IPS ten years ago.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Like Hell
programme.desc: When Doug is conspicuously not invited to Jared's barbecue, Doug and Carrie begin to feel insecure about their less-than-popular social standings at work. They both decide to overcompensate in an effort to rectify the situation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Sandwiched Out
programme.desc: When the guys' neighbourhood restaurant names a new sandwich 'The Deacon,' Doug gets angry. He claims that Deacon is taking credit for his sandwich creation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Shear Torture
programme.desc: When Carrie bans Doug from going to his hair salon, her friend points out that she's just as guilty as Doug, since she flirts with her attractive personal trainer.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Inn Escapable
programme.desc: When Ed and Betty, the owners of a bed and breakfast where Doug and Carrie are staying for a romantic weekend, become too overbearing for them, Carrie forces Doug to tell them they are going to stay at the new Hyatt Hotel across town.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Move Doubt
programme.desc: When the couple next door decides to sell their home, the Heffernans try to persuade Deacon and Kelly to buy it. Doug and Carrie realize something is wrong when the two are completely disinterested in the home. Danny and Spence try to impress a girl.

programme.title: The King of Queens: G'Night Stalker
programme.desc: When Doug starts receiving fan mail from someone who saw his performance at a karaoke club, he lets the attention go to his head, only to have his ego shattered when the emails suddenly stop.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Raygin' Bulls
programme.desc: After a quick shopping spree for some snazzy new clothes, Doug and Ray decide to check out the new nightclub in town. Confident that they still have the moves, they make a small wager to see which one can convince a girl to dance with him first.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Baker's Doesn't
programme.desc: When Doug and Carrie run into Father McDaniel at the movies they feel guilty that they haven't been to church in some time and sign up to help out during the busy holiday season. Meanwhile, Arthur and Spence try to write a Christmas carol.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Fresh Brood
programme.desc: In order to help convince Carrie it's time for a child, Doug borrows the baby from Danny so they can give parenting a test run. Doug quickly adjusts to being a dad, but the transition isn't as smooth for Carrie.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Gambling N'Diction
programme.desc: When Doug's mother beats him and the guys in a friendly game of poker, Doug sees an opportunity to capitalize on her poker skills and help him win a high stakes poker tournament.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Apartment Complex
programme.desc: In need of a place to hang out, Doug and the guys decide to rent an apartment above their favourite Chinese restaurant. Meanwhile, in order to keep her new client, Kirstie Alley, happy, Carrie is forced to consume large quantities of food in front of her.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Buggie Nights
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie discover their house is infested with bedbugs but Doug doesn't want to spend money on an exterminator. Meanwhile, Spence and Danny struggle to decide where they are going on vacation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Knee Jerk
programme.desc: Doug enjoys the extra attention Carrie gives him after he falls down the stairs and injures a knee. He then comes up with a plan for the pampering to continue even after he is healed.
